name: github_get_repo_readme_in_directory
description: Get the README from a repository directory (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/readme/{dir}). GitHub searches for a README under that path per the API docs. Optional ref is a branch, tag, or commit SHA (defaults to the default branch). Set decode_content to true to add decoded_content (UTF-8 from base64). See GitHub REST docs for repository README in a directory and custom media types (raw, HTML).
